gcal.sync_disabled_msg:
Google Calendar synchronization is currently disabled.
Please enable it in the sync settings.
gcal.setup_guide_msg:
Google Calendar sync is now on.
Please authenticate to begin syncing.
gcal.sync_already_running: A sync operation is already in progress.
gcal.first_setup_msg:
Welcome to Air Calendar!
Would you like to set up Google Calendar sync now?
gcal.issues_clear_confirm: Clear the selected sync issue marker?
gcal.issues_force_ignore_confirm:
Do you want to permanently stop syncing this item and remove it from the list?
It will not be retried again.
gcal.issues_retrying_msg: Manually retrying sync for this item. Please wait (notification will appear on completion).
gcal.issues_clear_healed_confirm: Do you want to clear all sync issues that have already been resolved or auto-healed by the system?

errors.remote_newer_than_local: Remote data is newer than local (server version kept to prevent conflict).
errors.not_found: Event not found on Google Calendar (deleted or ID mismatch).
errors.forbidden: No permission to modify this calendar.
errors.rate_limit: Google API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
errors.invalid_data: Schedule data format is incompatible with Google Calendar.
errors.delete_failed: Failed to delete the event on Google server.
errors.push_failed: Failed to push local changes to Google server.

treatments.pending_retry: Waiting for automatic retry after a transient error.
treatments.stopped: Sync stopped due to repeated failures. Manual fix required.
treatments.mirrored: Forced local update to match server data.
treatments.user_ignored: User chose to ignore this sync issue.
treatments.manual: Manual retry requested or action required.

guidance.remote_newer:
📍 [STATUS] Google server changes are newer than your local changes.
🛡 [ACTION] To prevent data loss, the app automatically prioritized server data and updated your local app.
✅ [OUTCOME] Local data is now fully synced. If you want to modify it, please edit the task again.
guidance.not_found:
📍 [STATUS] This event was not found on Google Calendar (might have been deleted elsewhere).
🛠 [ACTION] The app automatically restored it to Google or removed it locally to match current state.
✅ [OUTCOME] Sync state restored. You can 'Clear Error' or 'Retry' to finalize.
guidance.forbidden:
📍 [STATUS] No permission to write to this specific calendar (e.g. read-only shared calendar).
🚫 [ACTION] Sync was automatically suspended to prevent unauthorized modification attempts.
✅ [GUIDANCE] Check your permissions on Google Calendar web or use 'Force Ignore' to stop syncing this item.
guidance.auth:
📍 [STATUS] Google authentication has expired or is invalid.
🔒 [ACTION] All sync processes are safely paused for security.
✅ [GUIDANCE] Please go to 'Settings > Calendar & Sync > Authenticate' and log in again.
guidance.rate_limit:
📍 [STATUS] Too many sync requests sent to Google servers in a short time.
⏳ [ACTION] The app will automatically retry after a short wait period.
✅ [OUTCOME] This usually resolves itself after a few minutes.
guidance.generic:
📍 [DETAILS]
{error}

❓ [HOW TO FIX] Please check your internet connection and click 'Retry'.
If the issue persists, use 'Force Ignore' to remove it from the sync queue.

tooltip.active: Connected to Google Calendar. Periodic sync is enabled.
tooltip.auth_needed: Sync is enabled but authentication is missing.
tooltip.disconnected: Google synchronization is currently turned off.
tooltip.sleep:
Sync paused due to no recent changes.
Automatically resumes in {mins} minutes.
tooltip.warning: There are unresolved sync conflicts or failures.

gcal.issues_keep_local_tooltip: Keep local changes and overwrite Google.
gcal.issues_use_remote_done: Local data will be overwritten with the Google version.
gcal.issues_use_remote_tooltip: Overwrite local data with the Google Calendar version.
gcal.issues_select_hint: Select an item to see details about this issue and what the system did.

recurring.scope_info: This is a recurring event. Choose the scope of changes.

gcal.issues_clear_tooltip: Removes only this error indicator from the list. If the underlying issue persists, it may reappear.
gcal.issues_force_ignore_tooltip: Stops Google sync for this event and keeps it as local-only.
gcal.issues_retry_tooltip: Manually retry syncing this event right now.

gcal_settings.title: Calendar & Sync Settings
gcal_settings.setup_summary: Use your own Google Cloud OAuth desktop credentials. Official documentation is safer and easier to keep current than a single language-specific video.
gcal_settings.setup_steps:
1. Create or open a Google Cloud project.
2. Enable Google Calendar API.
3. Create OAuth Client ID for a Desktop app.
4. Download the JSON credentials file and register it below.
gcal_settings.tip_project_body: Create a Google Cloud project or reuse one dedicated to this app.
gcal_settings.tip_api_body: Enable Google Calendar API before creating credentials.
gcal_settings.tip_oauth_body: Create a Desktop app OAuth client ID. Web credentials will not work here.
gcal_settings.tip_json_body: Download the credentials JSON and register it in the sync section.
gcal_settings.setup_note: Tip: if you manage multiple calendars, authenticate once, then paste the target calendar ID in the sync section.
gcal_settings.sync_intro: Set credentials, calendar target, and timezone here. Then authenticate once and verify access.
gcal_settings.creds_help: Only the desktop OAuth client JSON is supported.
gcal_settings.calendar_id_help: Use `primary` for your main calendar, or paste a shared calendar email/ID.
gcal_settings.calendar_choice_hint: Authenticate first, then load the calendars available to this account.
gcal_settings.load_calendars_auth_needed: Authenticate first to load the calendars available to this account.
gcal_settings.load_calendars_ok: Loaded {count} calendars. Choosing one will fill its Calendar ID.
gcal_settings.load_calendars_empty: No accessible calendars were returned for this account.
gcal_settings.timezone_help: Choose a city-based timezone such as `America/New_York`. Daylight saving time will be handled automatically.
gcal_settings.timezone_invalid: The selected timezone could not be resolved.
gcal_settings.account_tip: If the connected account changes, re-authentication may be required to safely refresh calendar bindings.
gcal_settings.advanced_summary: Recommended defaults work well for most users.
gcal_settings.advanced_help: Use a shorter quick sync for active editing, and a longer regular sync for lower background activity.
gcal_settings.status_connected_desc: Authentication is complete. You can adjust calendar, timezone, and sync behavior here.
gcal_settings.status_not_connected_desc: Save your settings first if needed, then run authentication to connect this app to Google Calendar.
gcal_settings.diagnostics_summary: Check current sync health, pending issues, and repair the local sync cache when needed.
gcal_settings.reset_sync_state_help: Resetting the sync cache clears stored sync tokens for the current binding and forces a safe full rescan on the next sync.
gcal_settings.reset_sync_state_done_body: Cleared sync cache for {count} calendar binding(s). The next sync will run as a full rescan.
gcal_settings.creds_missing: The selected credentials file could not be found.
gcal_settings.copy_error_body:
Could not copy the credentials file.
{error}
gcal_settings.test_access_idle: No test has been run yet.
gcal_settings.test_access_auth_needed: Authenticate first to test calendar access.
gcal_settings.saved_body: Your Google sync settings have been saved.
gcal_settings.reset_confirm: Delete saved credentials and token information for Google sync?
gcal_settings.sleep_mode_body: When no changes are detected for several consecutive cycles, sync automatically enters sleep mode to reduce unnecessary API calls.
gcal_settings.calendar_desc: Add and manage calendars for saving events. Click the color dot to change color.
gcal_settings.add_ics_desc: Enter an ICS URL to import external calendar events in read-only mode.
gcal_settings.cal_list_empty: No calendars. Use the button above to add one.
gcal_settings.cal_list_empty_sub:
No ICS subscriptions.
Use the button above to add an ICS URL.
gcal_settings.edit_gcal_name_notice: Google Calendar names are managed by Google.
gcal_settings.edit_gcal_name_tooltip: Google Calendar names can only be changed in Google.
gcal_settings.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this calendar?
gcal_settings.hide_completed: Hide completed events in Google Calendar
gcal_settings.hide_completed_help: Events marked as done are automatically hidden in Google Calendar.
gcal_settings.subscription_desc: Subscribe to external calendars (iCal/ICS URL) in read-only mode.
gcal_settings.test_access_cal_not_found: Account access OK ({count} calendars) — Selected calendar ID not found. Please refresh the list.

shortcut.title: Dark Calendar Shortcut Guide
shortcut.content:
Shortcut Guide

[Schedule Management]
• Ctrl + N: Add New Schedule
• Ctrl + R: Register Routine
• Ctrl + D: Register Directive
• Ctrl + L: Manage Checklist Templates
• Ctrl + Shift + L: Desktop Lock Mode

[Screen Operations]
• Ctrl + B: Show/Hide Top Bar
• Ctrl + M: Toggle Magnet Mode
• Ctrl + F: Toggle Focus Mode
• Ctrl + Space: Toggle Focus Mode
• F11: Toggle Fullscreen
• Ctrl + Alt + R: Routine Weekly Dashboard

[Layout Presets]
• Ctrl + Shift + 1: Full Docked Layout
• Ctrl + Shift + 2: Calendar Focused Layout
• Ctrl + Shift + 3: Task Focused Layout
• Ctrl + Shift + 4: Tab Split Layout
• Ctrl + Shift + 5: Full Detached Layout
• Ctrl + Shift + S: Save Current Layout

[Navigation]
• Ctrl + Left/Right: Prev/Next Date
• Ctrl + T: Jump to Today
• Delete: Delete Selected Schedule
• Delete (on date): Delete All Schedules on that Date
• Esc: Clear Selection
• F1: Open Shortcut Guide
Dark Calendar
Version: {APP_VERSION}
Author: {APP_AUTHOR} ({APP_EMAIL})

help.title: How to Use Calendar
help.content:
How to Use Calendar

1) Add Schedule
Double-click a date or Ctrl + N

2) Modify Schedule
Double-click a schedule to edit details

3) Move/Copy Schedule
Drag: Move, Shift + Drag: Copy

4) Delete Schedule
Select schedule and press Delete
Press Delete on a date to clear all schedules for that day.

🔒 You are away.
